# Emmanuel Norambuena — Product Engineer & Builder

https://eanorambuena.github.io

## About
Product Engineer specializing in AI infrastructure, full-stack development, and real-time systems. Based in Chile. Creator of Emmy.js (web component library), Kalmate (financial terminal), Peer Evaluation Platform, and Neural client management system.

## Key pages
- Portfolio: https://eanorambuena.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eanorambuena
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/eanorambuena

## Projects

### Emmy.js
Lightweight library for building web components using functional programming patterns. Open source with 1,000+ npm downloads.
- GitHub: https://github.com/emmyjs/emmy-dom
- Web: https://emmyjs.pages.dev

### Kalmate
Bloomberg-style financial terminal with real-time market data via Yahoo Finance. Built with Nuxt 3 and TradingView charts.
- Web: https://kalmate.app

### Peer Evaluation Platform
Platform serving 1,500+ concurrent students with real-time dashboards and automated cross-review. Cut grading time by 60% across 3+ universities.

### GIS App for Mining
Frontend GIS visualization app for Acofuz, used by Procel and Antofagasta Minerals. Handles 50k+ geospatial data points.

### Neural
User management and client administration dashboard with role-based access and real-time updates.

## Experience
- NeuralWorks SpA (2024-2025): React Native, TypeScript, AI
- Acofuz (2024): React, TypeScript, GIS
- IDS UC (2023-2024): Next.js, React, PostgreSQL, AWS
- Open Source UC (2023-2024): Leadership, Events, Community

## Contact
- Email: eanorambuena@uc.cl
- GitHub: https://github.com/eanorambuena
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/eanorambuena
